title: Rewind/Fast-Forward
description: Custom player UI with rewind and fast-forward buttons
long_description: A custom player UI with rewind and fast-forward buttons in the control bar. A quick -10/+10-second seek is performed when the buttons are clicked.

metadata.title: Bitmovin Player UI » Rewind/Fast-Forward
metadata.description: Try Rewind and Fast-Forward with Bitmovin Player UI
